1990June 25, 1990

🇸🇪 Gothenburg, Sweden

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Gothenburg, Sweden, June 25, 1990 -- July 5, 1990

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-1990-06-gothenburg-sweden

17 Resolutions

75Plenary
Establish new Editing Committee for STEP Parts and define its tasks
SC 4 establishes an Editing Committee to finalise the texts of the Parts of the STEP standard for submission as a Draft International Standard and maintain configuration control so that all future ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
74Plenary
Amend PMAG terms of reference item "c"
Terms of reference item "c" for the PMAG that is defined in SC 4 Resolution # 49 shall be changed so that it shall read, "coordinate activities between Product Data Definition Working Groups and th...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
73Plenary
Accept new work item on industrial manufacturing management data
SC 4 moves to accept for ballot a new work item on industrial manufacturing management data (SC 4 N60, submitted by France).
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
72Plenary
Require CDs circulated within SC 4 to be circulated for ballot
CDs circulated within SC 4 shall only be circulated for ballot.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
71Plenary
Welcome Part 11 EXPRESS as first Committee Draft of STEP
SC 4 welcomes Part 11 EXPRESS (WG 1 N496) as the first CD of the STEP work item.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
70Plenary
Direct PMAG to organize WG work to achieve CD ballot goals
SC 4 directs PMAG to organize the work of the Working Groups in order to achieve the goals in Resolutions # 68 and # 69. NOTE: This resolution was originally passed and designated as Resolution 70:...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
69Plenary
Direct project leaders to complete STEP parts for CD ballot
SC 4 directs the project leaders who are responsible for the development of the following STEP parts to complete their documents both technically and editorially, for CD ballot by December 1990: * ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
68Plenary
Define the parts that comprise STEP Version 1.0
SC 4 resolves that STEP Version 1.0 comprises the following parts: * Overview (Part 1) * Express (Part 11) * Physical File (Part 21) * Conformance Testing (Part 31) * Generic Product Data Model (Pa...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
67Plenary
Appoint conveners for WG 3 through 7
SC 4 appoints the following working group conveners: * WG 3 Product Modeling: Barbara Warthen (USA) * WG 4 Qualification & Integration: Yuhwei Yang (USA) * WG 5 STEP Development Methods: Bill Danne...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
65Plenary
Adopt reorganization structure and disband WG 1
SC 4 adopts the reorganization structure as proposed by the ad hoc reorganization group in Reston. The current WG 1 is to be disbanded, effective at the end of the Gothenburg meeting, and its curre...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
64Plenary
Define guidelines for AP development outside SC 4
SC 4 requests the PMAG to define requirements for guidelines to permit the development of APs both inside and outside SC 4. Provision should also be made for the registration of APs with SC 4 to en...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
63Plenary
Assign AP project leaders for APs 3, 5, and 18
SC 4 adopts the following recommendation of the ad hoc Application Protocols group: In order to ensure the timely delivery of APs, a project leader must be assigned for each of the APs listed in Re...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
62Plenary
Adopt recommendation for STEP Version 1.0 Application Protocols
SC 4 adopts the following recommendation of the ad hoc Application Protocols group: Following the WG 1 decision that STEP Version 1.0 must include at least one draughting related AP, the SC 4 ad ho...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
61Plenary
Ask electrical project leader to develop electrical schematic APs
SC 4 asks its electrical project leader to develop one or more electrical schematic application protocols based upon documented efforts such as the German VNS, the French SET electrical, the IEC/TC...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
60Plenary
Instruct SPAG to resolve EIA petition to IEC
SC 4 charges the Strategic Planning Advisory Group with carrying out the intent of SC 4 Resolution 44 (Electrical Harmonization), particularly working toward a resolution of the developing situatio...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 thanks the WG 1 convener, Mr Jerry Weiss, for his pioneering leadership and personal dedication to the STEP development over the last six years, and looks forward to his continuing support as ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 wishes to thank Sweden for hosting the SC 4 meeting in Gothenburg.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
